articles.title: GENAI SEARCH IN ECOMMERCE: WHAT'S ACTUALLY WORKING?
articles.summary: Keyword matching is becoming yesterday's approach as context-aware systems take over - but “just add AI” isn't going to work for mature digital stores.

ANTHROPIC EXPLORING MODEL WELFARE
articles.summary: Anthropic launched a new research initiative to examine the potential moral relevance of AI systems, including how and when model welfare should be considered in alignment and safety efforts.

articles.title: ADOBE'S NEW IMAGE MODEL
articles.summary: Adobe unveiled a major Firefly update that unifies image, video, audio, and vector generation tools, along with mobile support and deeper Creative Cloud integration.

articles.title: PERPLEXITY AND MOTOROLA PARTNERSHIP
articles.summary: Perplexity will be pre-installed on new Motorola phones with features like voice control, smart reminders, and direct integration with Moto AI, including 3 months of Pro access.

articles.title: DEPLOYING AGENTS AS REAL-TIME APIS
articles.summary: PhiloAgents lesson shows how to turn game simulation agents into API-ready, real-time interactive characters for more immersive environments.

articles.title: THE URGENCY OF INTERPRETABILITY IN AI
articles.summary: AI interpretability must advance as models grow more complex. The field should prioritize transparency to mitigate risk.

articles.title: OPENAI ALUMS, NOBEL LAUREATES URGE REGULATORS TO SAVE COMPANY'S NONPROFIT STRUCTURE
articles.summary: A recent letter signed by prominent figures argued against OpenAI's transition to a for-profit model, stating it undermines its founding mission to ensure AGI benefits humanity. The letter urged state attorneys general to block the restructuring, emphasizing that prioritizing shareholder returns could jeopardize essential safeguards.

articles.title: TRAE AI INTRODUCES @AGENT: BUILD YOUR OWN TEAM OF AI DEVELOPERS
articles.summary: Trae [12], the AI-powered IDE, now lets you summon specialized AI agents using @mentions (just like tagging that colleague who actually remembers context). Create your own custom agents, define their rules, and never lose context between conversations. Read about out the new

articles.title: agent ecosystem on the Trae blog
GOOGLE'S BENCHMARK FOR BRAIN MODELING
articles.summary: Google, HHMI, and Harvard have introduced ZAPBench, a larval zebrafish dataset combining structural and functional brain data for advancing neural activity prediction models.

articles.title: WEED MAPPING FOR SMARTER FARMING
articles.summary: This study introduces RoWeeder, a new framework for identifying weeds in agricultural fields using unsupervised methods. It combines crop-row detection with a noise-resistant deep learning model, training it to differentiate crops from weeds based on crop-row information.

articles.title: EFFICIENT LLM DISTILLATION
articles.summary: MiniPLM is a new framework designed to enhance pre-training of small language models using knowledge from larger models.

articles.title: LOW-LATENCY STREAMING APPS WITH GOOGLE'S LIVE API
articles.summary: Google's Live API lets developers build real-time interactive apps by processing live audio, video, and text with minimal delay.

articles.title: OMDET TURBO (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: A strong improvement in real time, open vocabulary, object detection.

articles.title: FASTER DRUG DEVELOPMENT
articles.summary: GEMCODE is a new AI-based system for automating co-crystal screening.

articles.title: DISTILLING DEEPSEEK-R1 INTO LOCAL MODELS WITH HP AI STUDIO
articles.summary: Learn how to shrink DeepSeek-R1's reasoning powers into models that fit on your machine, deploy to Ollama for local inference, and free

articles.title: your AI from the cloud. Join the live workshop
PERPLEXITY LAUNCHES AI-POWERED MOBILE ASSISTANT FOR IOS
articles.summary: Perplexity launched an AI assistant app for iOS with real-time answers and research tools.

articles.title: GOOGLE'S AI OVERVIEWS REACH 1.5 BILLION MONTHLY USERS
articles.summary: Google reported that AI Overviews hit 1.5 billion monthly users.

articles.title: MICROSOFT 365 COPILOT: YOUR WINDOW INTO THE WORLD OF AGENTS
articles.summary: Microsoft announced the release of Microsoft 365 Copilot Wave 2, which introduces new capabilities like AI-powered search, content creation tools, and an Agent Store featuring reasoning agents powered by OpenAI.
